title: Telemetry Backend — Grafana Cloud
description: Managed Grafana Cloud stack (Grafana + Mimir metrics + Loki logs + Tempo traces). OSS-compatible APIs on a fully managed SaaS backend; no infrastructure to operate.

cost.costNotes: Free tier: 10k active metrics, 50GB logs, 50GB traces, 50GB profiles. Pro tier is consumption-based. Small production (~50k metrics, 100GB logs/month): ~$50-100/month. Medium (~500k metrics, 500GB logs/month): ~$200-500/month.

provenance.estimatedMonthlyRangeUsd: Grafana Cloud pricing (2025): Metrics $8/1M active series over free tier; Logs $0.50/GB over 50GB/month; Traces $0.50/GB over 50GB/month. Min ($0): free tier covers most small apps and side projects. Max ($500): medium production with 500k active metrics + 500GB/month logs + 200GB traces.
provenance.adoptionCost: OSS-compatible APIs (Prometheus remote-write, Loki push, OTLP) mean minimal migration effort. Setup: agent/OTel collector config (~8h), dashboard migration or creation (~12h). Total ~20h at $40/hour = ~$800.
provenance.licenseCost: No upfront license; free tier available, paid tiers are consumption-based.

provides.reasoning: Grafana Cloud is a fully managed observability backend. Accepts Prometheus remote-write for metrics, Loki push API for logs, and OTLP or Jaeger for traces via Grafana Tempo.
Grafana Loki (managed) ingests structured log streams with label-based indexing. Supports JSON log parsing and LogQL for querying. Correlates logs with traces via trace_id fields.
Grafana Mimir provides horizontally scalable, multi-tenant, long-term Prometheus-compatible metrics storage with PromQL query support.
Grafana Tempo (managed) provides cost-efficient distributed tracing storage with TraceQL query language and native integration with Grafana dashboards for trace-metric correlation.

Grafana Cloud captures and stores discrete application events through Loki log streams, Mimir counter metrics, and Tempo trace events, providing event-tracking infrastructure for observability and compliance.

availability.reason: Free tier available; commercially available SaaS with no access restrictions

supports_nfr.reason: Telemetry backend is meaningful from 90% availability upward; below that, service reliability is the primary concern, not observability infrastructure.
Grafana Cloud's paid SLA is 99.9%; at 4-nines availability targets a secondary observability path is needed beyond this single SaaS backend.
Grafana Cloud supports audit logging for paid tiers; compatible with or without this requirement.
Grafana Cloud is a managed SaaS with 99.9% SLA; agent reconnection after restart completes in seconds. RTO >= 5 minutes is supported.
Grafana Mimir and Loki are designed for horizontal scale; they handle millions of time-series samples and log lines per hour.
Grafana Agent/Alloy collects metrics asynchronously; telemetry forwarding does not add per-request overhead to application read paths.
Grafana Cloud ingestion is asynchronous and batched; it does not constrain application write throughput.
Grafana Cloud offers EU data residency options and is GDPR compliant; compatible with or without GDPR requirements.
Grafana Cloud Enterprise offers HIPAA-compliant configurations with data isolation and access controls.
Grafana Cloud data privacy controls are compatible with CCPA requirements.
Grafana Cloud audit logging and access controls on paid plans support SOX compliance requirements.

supports_constraints.reason: Grafana Cloud is cloud-agnostic and accepts telemetry from any environment via standard APIs.
Grafana Cloud variant is only selected when the user has explicitly approved grafana-cloud as an acceptable SaaS provider.
Grafana Cloud ingests via standard protocols (OTLP, Prometheus, Loki) — language-agnostic.
Grafana Cloud supports monitoring all platform types via standard telemetry protocols.

metrics_retention_days.description: Metrics retention period. 13 months on free/pro; longer requires enterprise plan.

log_retention_days.description: Log retention in Grafana Cloud Loki. Longer retention increases monthly cost.

traces_enabled.description: Enable Grafana Tempo for distributed tracing. Free tier includes 50GB/month; consumption-based beyond that.
